name: rodrigopg
description: Personal Claude Code plugins by Rodrigo Gonçalves

plugins.name: whatsapp-mcp
plugins.description: WhatsApp for Claude — messages, media, groups, transcription

plugins.name: prime-context
plugins.description: On-demand project context loading — thin AGENTS.md router, area context files loaded only when needed

plugins.name: github-branch-protection
plugins.description: Protect GitHub branches against direct pushes — native protection or Actions workaround per plan

plugins.name: easypanel
plugins.description: Manage and diagnose EasyPanel services via Playwright — deploys, failures, build logs

plugins.name: keepass
plugins.description: KeePass database management via keepassxc-cli — search, add, edit, merge duplicates, OS secret store auth

plugins.name: discli
plugins.description: Discord server management CLI for AI agents — channels, roles, messages, embeds, emojis, one command per API call

plugins.name: proxmox
plugins.description: Proxmox VE hypervisor primitives via pve CLI — VMs, snapshots, clones, VNC console automation (private repo)

plugins.name: protheus-smartview
plugins.description: Talk to Protheus through SmartView reports — ask in natural language, get real data back (private repo)
